{{Quote|Aron, you must ''turn away.'' The radiation levels are deadly. If we go any closer to that city, we'll ''die!''|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], to [[Aron Peacebringer]]|<ref name="marvel53" />}}
'''K'avor''' was a city located in the [[Outlands (Shiva IV)|Outlands]] of the remote [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Shiva IV]], situated far from the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Illyriaqüm]].<ref name="marvel53" /> One of the few [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlements found in that region of the planet,<ref name="aliens" /> K'avor was destroyed by a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[anti-matter bomb]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The blast completely laid waste to the city, and a runaway [[Cherenkov effect]] caused its ruins to shine with radioactive blue flame.<ref name="marvel53" /> However, not all of K'avor's population were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the bombing. One K'avor native, [[Lobar Aybock]], was instead captured by the Empire, which sold him to [[Zygerrian/Legends|Zygerrian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] after he was ruled unfit for [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] training. After attaining his freedom, Aybock later became a champion [[Shockboxing/Legends|shockboxer]].<ref name="fists">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/fiction/feature20081031.html|text="Fists of Ion"|int=Fists of Ion|newhost=Suvudu}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
K'avor first appeared in ''[[Star Wars (1977) 53|Star Wars 53: The Last Gift from Alderaan]]'', written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1981]].<ref name="marvel53" />
